---

> ⚠️ **Stop! GitHub Issues is not the right place for questions about the book's content.**
>
> Please ask in [Manning's liveBook forum](https://livebook.manning.com/) for this book. The forum is where the author and other readers gather to discuss the material. You'll get faster, better answers there, and the question may help future readers too.
>
> **GitHub Issues** is for **code bugs and errata in this repository**, not for "how does this technique work?" or "why did the book make this choice?" style questions.

---

If you're still sure your question belongs here (e.g., it's specifically about how to run the code, not about the book's content), please use the [Bug report](.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md) template if it's about a runtime problem, or describe below what's actually about the code and not the book.

## What's your question

Include the chapter and listing you're working with.

- [ ] I searched the book's [liveBook forum](https://livebook.manning.com/) for this question
- [ ] I read the chapter's README in `code/chapterNN/README.md`
- [ ] I searched existing issues on this repo
